summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Alpha Agency document management system. All requested features are working correctly including triple-click admin access, admin login, documents page, and document CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Triple-click on footer logo successfully redirects to /alpha-admin-2024
Admin login with admin@alphagency.fr / superpassword works correctly
Documents page accessible after login with proper navigation
Document creation modal opens with type and template selectors
API GET /api/documents/types returns 2 types (Lettre de mission, Fiche de contact) with 8 templates total
Document types API shows 6 templates for Lettre de mission and 2 for Fiche de contact
Existing documents display correctly in table format
Document actions menu (View, Edit, Download PDF, Delete) available and functional
Document view modal opens and displays document details correctly
Search filter and type filter components present and functional
Backend API authentication working with correct credentials
All CRUD operations for contacts, opportunities, quotes working
Document creation API endpoint functional (tested via backend_test.py)
Dashboard navigation and layout working properly
